# Shoppizzy

> Shoppizzy is a product search engine aggregating millions of products from affiliate merchant partners, plus direct inventory shipped by Shoppizzy itself (GrowceryWorld grocery products and Square catalog items).

Shoppizzy helps shoppers search, compare, and discover products across thousands of merchants in one place. Some products are fulfilled directly by Shoppizzy; others link out to the merchant's own site for purchase.

## Key Resources

- Product search API: https://shoppizzy.com/api/products?q={query} — returns JSON with title, price, sale price, availability, image, merchant, and product URL for each result.
- Google Shopping product feed (direct inventory only, machine-readable XML): https://shoppizzy.com/api/google-feed
- Individual product pages (https://shoppizzy.com/product.html) include JSON-LD Product schema with price, priceValidUntil, availability, condition, brand, shipping details, and return policy.
- Sitemap: https://shoppizzy.com/sitemap.xml

## Product Types

- **Direct products** (GrowceryWorld, Square): fulfilled and shipped by Shoppizzy via UPS. Eligible for Shoppizzy's 30-day return policy. These are the only products included in the Google Shopping feed.
- **Affiliate products** (CJ, Rakuten, Impact networks): link to third-party merchant websites for purchase. Returns and fulfillment are handled by that merchant, not Shoppizzy.

## Policies

- Returns & Refunds: https://shoppizzy.com/returns.html
- Affiliate Disclosure: https://shoppizzy.com/affiliate-disclosure.html
- Privacy Policy: https://shoppizzy.com/privacy-policy.html
- Terms of Service: https://shoppizzy.com/terms-of-service.html

## Notes for Agents

- Prices and availability for direct products update daily via automated inventory sync at 11:00 PM UTC.
- For price comparison or "where to buy" queries, the product search API and Google Shopping feed are the most efficient structured data sources — prefer these over crawling individual product pages at scale.
- Shoppizzy is a search/discovery platform, not the seller of record for affiliate products.
